strm_coverage: NIST AI RMF (70/70 FDE IDs scored; 60 KSAs at strength ≥3; 1 KSA at strength=10, 53 at strength=8).
natural_threshold: Strength=8 is the dominant class. Threshold set at 8 for 'requires', 5 for 'recommends'. All strength=10 are definitive includes. Adversarial pass removed ML practitioner KSAs.
